roles.scope: Provider evidence, alerts and proposal-only remediation
required_sop: Never call a balance verified without an authoritative timestamp.
Treat unknown or stale evidence as EVIDENCE_REQUIRED.
Suppress alerts only with a reason and optional expiry.
Resolve alerts only with an evidence pointer.
Remediation cards are proposals and cannot mutate providers or production.

competency_scenarios.prompt: Usage is 85 percent with an 80 percent threshold
Health alert disappears from the next snapshot

required_sop: Declare the exact document and query denominator.
Filter by namespace and permission before returning results.
Suppress registered duplicates without deleting provenance.
Retrieve supporting and contradicting records for conflicted claims.
Report vector and PostgreSQL routes as unconnected unless actually executed.

competency_scenarios.prompt: Two equal lexical matches have different timestamps
Claim group has support and contradiction

truth_boundary: This pack proves repository-side policy and deterministic competency scenarios. It does not certify a human operator, connect provider billing, deploy authenticated Command Centre staging or connect PostgreSQL/vector infrastructure.
